XPMP2
X-Plane multiplayer library 2 - using instancing
Here is a list of all functions with links to the classes they belong to:

- l -

  • LegacyAircraft() : XPMP2::LegacyAircraft
  • listen() : XPMP2::TCPConnection
  • listenAccept() : XPMP2::TCPConnection
  • Load() : XPMP2::CSLObj
  • LoadSoundFile() : XPMP2::SoundSystem, XPMP2::SoundSystemFMOD, XPMP2::SoundSystemXP
  • LocalIntfAddrTy() : XPMP2::LocalIntfAddrTy
  • LogErr() : XPMP2::FmodError
